title: Optimals
description: A modpack that strikes the perfect balance between performance and quality
body:
# What is Optimals?
Optimals is a simple Minecraft modpack focusing on performance and gameplay quality. Optimals is faster than other modpacks thanks to carefully selected mods that will provide noticeable improvements on any device.

# Why use Optimals?
## Works everywhere
Optimals does not include content mods, so you can play on any world or server that supports vanilla.

## Up to date
Optimals is updated routinely to the latest version of Minecraft with the newest mods while still preserving your settings.

## Built on Fabric
Fabulously Optimized uses the Fabric mod loader, which is both lightweight and fast.

# FAQ
    Q: What mods does it have?
    A: Click on any version and look at the dependencies section

    Q: Do I need the modpack installed on the server?
    A: No, the modpack works on all servers that allow vanilla clients.
